rationale: Both correctly diagnose the None+1 TypeError from the base tokenizer lacking extended ratio tokens, cite the same Tencent reference, and give the confirmed hunyuan_image3_dit.yaml workaround plus a sensible guard fix. X better matches the thread's actual disposition (Gaohan123 wants the hardening tracked in a new issue, implying this bug report itself is resolved), while Y's 'keep-open/reopen when guard PR merges' verdict misreads that resolution. Y also pads its answer with a redundant 'Additional context' section duplicating the draft_answer and throws in unverifiable specifics (exact token IDs, a third ar-only yaml) not grounded in the given thread, making it noisier without adding real value.
